calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
TENTATIVE RULING: Matter will be called to admit will. No appearance is required. Status hearing on close of estate will be set for 12/27/27. No appearance will be necessary on that date if either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Probate Code 12200 et seq is filed at least two weeks prior.
EXAMINER: SEAN BANG
